diary_entries.entry: Another year. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.
The dust_storm changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. A massive dust storm engulfs the colony. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 79): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
